name: make-first
description: Make-centric development plugin: enforces Makefile structure, TDD practices, shell scripting standards, and the uv/Python toolchain. Auto-redirects direct tool invocations to make targets.

_meta.notes: pre-tool hook uses modifiedArgs to auto-redirect direct tool calls to make targets with additionalContext for agent learning; CLI 1.0.26 provides COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT env var to hooks — used for robust path resolution; CLI 1.0.26 deduplicates instruction files and consolidates applyTo patterns, reducing token usage for the 5-skill plugin
